display.purpose: Home hero wordmark only. One oversize gesture per page.

headline.purpose: Page titles (h1): event and post names, listing headers.

body.purpose: Long-form reading. Capped at 68 to 72ch; agenda runs full width.

label.purpose: Mono eyebrows, dates, agenda subcategory labels, technical metadata.

shadows.name: menu-overlay
shadows.purpose: Mobile navigation popover only. The single legitimate ambient shadow; everything else is hairline + tonal layering.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Default ease-out (quint) for state transitions and image scale. No bounce, no elastic.

motion.name: theme-transition
motion.purpose: Background and text color crossfade on light/dark toggle.

components.name: Primary Action Link
components.description: The system's primary action: a confident text link with a trailing arrow. There are no filled buttons.
components.html: See upcoming events
components.css: .ds-link-action { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; font-family: 'Hanken Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; color: var(--color-link, oklch(0.45 0.10 250)); text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.15s ease; } .ds-link-action:hover { color: var(--color-link-hover, oklch(0.36 0.11 255)); } .ds-link-action:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-brand, oklch(0.74 0.165 58)); outline-offset: 2px; border-radius: 2px; }

components.name: Prose Link
components.description: Inline link inside reading text: underlined with a faded rule that solidifies on hover.
components.html: We follow the Chatham House Rule at this event.
components.css: .ds-link-prose { font-family: 'Hanken Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; color: var(--color-link, oklch(0.45 0.10 250)); text-underline-offset: 3px; text-decoration-color: color-mix(in oklch, currentColor 30%, transparent); transition: color 0.15s ease, text-decoration-color 0.15s ease; } .ds-link-prose:hover { color: var(--color-link-hover, oklch(0.36 0.11 255)); text-decoration-color: currentColor; }

components.name: Eyebrow Label
components.description: Mono uppercase label above section headings and as agenda subcategory markers. Typographic, not a pill.
components.css: .ds-eyebrow { font-family: 'Spline Sans Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.18em; color: var(--color-accent, oklch(0.40 0.09 255)); }

components.name: Nav Item
components.description: Top navigation link. Muted by default, ink on hover with a sunk-paper fill; active route is ink.
components.html: HomeAboutContact
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; gap: 0.25rem; font-family: 'Hanken Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-item { padding: 0.375rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 0.375rem; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; color: var(--color-muted, oklch(0.475 0.018 260)); transition: color 0.15s ease, background-color 0.15s ease; } .ds-nav-item:hover { color: var(--color-ink, oklch(0.235 0.013 260)); background: var(--color-surface-2, oklch(0.954 0.006 75)); } .ds-nav-item--active { color: var(--color-ink, oklch(0.235 0.013 260)); }

components.name: Callout
components.description: Inline notice. Full hairline border plus sunk-paper background; warning variant swaps the border to Signal Orange. Never a side-stripe.
components.html:
⚠️
Topics are provided ahead of the event so you can read up first.
components.css: .ds-callout { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 1rem; padding: 1rem; border: 1px solid var(--color-line, oklch(0.90 0.006 75)); border-radius: 0.5rem; background: var(--color-surface-2, oklch(0.954 0.006 75)); color: var(--color-ink, oklch(0.235 0.013 260)); font-family: Literata, Georgia, serif; } .ds-callout--warning { border-color: var(--color-brand, oklch(0.74 0.165 58)); } .ds-callout__icon { font-size: 1.5rem; line-height: 1; }

components.name: Post Preview Row
components.description: Feed item for home and listings. Rhythm-separated row with a rounded media frame, mono date eyebrow, serif preview. Not a card grid.
components.html:
May 20, 2026

Bitcoin Socratic Seminar #50

Our Socratic Seminar events are formatted to foster debate, information sharing, and lively discussion…
components.css: .ds-post { display: flex; gap: 1.75rem; align-items: flex-start; } .ds-post__media { flex: none; width: 15rem; border: 1px solid var(--color-line, oklch(0.90 0.006 75)); border-radius: 0.75rem; overflow: hidden; background: var(--color-surface-2, oklch(0.954 0.006 75)); } .ds-post__img { aspect-ratio: 16 / 9; background: linear-gradient(135deg, oklch(0.74 0.165 58 / 0.25), var(--color-surface-2, oklch(0.954 0.006 75))); transition: transform 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-post:hover .ds-post__img { transform: scale(1.04); } .ds-post__date { font-family: 'Spline Sans Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.14em; color: var(--color-faint, oklch(0.585 0.016 260)); } .ds-post__title { margin: 0.375rem 0; font-family: 'Hanken Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1.5rem; } .ds-post__title a { color: var(--color-ink, oklch(0.235 0.013 260)); text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.15s ease; } .ds-post__title a:hover { color: var(--color-brand-strong, oklch(0.55 0.142 50)); } .ds-post__excerpt { max-width: 68ch; font-family: Literata, Georgia, serif; line-height: 1.7; color: var(--color-muted, oklch(0.475 0.018 260)); }

components.name: Agenda Category Heading
components.description: Signature surface. Category divider on the projected topic list, with a leading Signal Orange tick and large calm topic links beneath.
components.html:
Bitcoin

Core, Relay & Policy

  • Bitcoin Core v31 Released
  • Update on large OP_RETURN usage
components.css: .ds-agenda { font-family: Literata, Georgia, serif; } .ds-agenda__cat { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.75rem; font-family: 'Hanken Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: clamp(1.3rem, 1.1vw + 0.8rem, 1.75rem); margin: 2.5rem 0 0.75rem; } .ds-agenda__cat::before { content: ''; flex: none; width: 0.3em; height: 0.85em; border-radius: 1px; background: var(--color-brand, oklch(0.74 0.165 58)); } .ds-agenda__sub { font-family: 'Spline Sans Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.12em; color: var(--color-accent, oklch(0.40 0.09 255)); margin: 2rem 0 0.5rem; } .ds-agenda__list { list-style: none; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.5rem; padding-left: 0.25rem; } .ds-agenda__list li { position: relative; padding-left: 1.5rem; } .ds-agenda__list li::before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 0.25rem; top: 0.7em; width: 0.375rem; height: 0.375rem; border-radius: 9999px; background: var(--color-faint, oklch(0.585 0.016 260)); } .ds-agenda__list a { font-family: 'Hanken Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; color: var(--color-link, oklch(0.45 0.10 250)); text-underline-offset: 3px; } .ds-agenda__list a:hover { color: var(--color-link-hover, oklch(0.36 0.11 255)); }

narrative.overview: This system reads like a well-set technical reference book that happens to live on the web and, one night a month, on a projector. It earns credibility through precision and legibility rather than polish or spectacle. The voice is open, grounded, and credible: it respects a reader of any skill level without gatekeeping, and it never reaches for crypto-marketing energy to manufacture excitement. The system is committed to two colors: orange anchors identity and marks the live agenda; a deep slate ink carries structure, links, and reading furniture. Type does the heavy lifting, with a humanist grotesque for headings, a screen-reading serif for long-form, and a mono reserved strictly for genuinely technical tokens.
keyCharacteristics: Committed two-color palette: Signal Orange anchor, Slate Ink structure.
Confident fluid type scale, varied spacing, left-aligned reading column.
High contrast in both themes, tuned for projection at a distance.

rules.name: The Signal Rule
rules.body: Orange is a signal, never a surface. It marks and emphasizes (agenda ticks, hover, selection); it never fills a hero or button background.

rules.name: The Two-Theme Parity Rule
rules.body: Light and dark are co-equal. Every role token is redefined under .dark, and both themes are tuned high-contrast for projection. Dark is deep slate ink, never pure black.

rules.name: The Tinted-Neutral Rule
rules.body: No #000, no #fff. Light neutrals tint warm (hue ~75); dark neutrals tint slate (hue ~260). Chroma stays low.

rules.name: The Mono-Is-Technical Rule
rules.body: Monospace appears only on genuinely technical tokens: dates, BIP/CVE numbers, addresses, inline code, eyebrow labels. Never a decorative shorthand for 'developer'.

rules.name: The One-Display-Moment Rule
rules.body: Display type is a single oversize gesture (the hero wordmark). Do not stack multiple display-scale elements on one screen.

rules.name: The Hairline-First Rule
rules.body: Separation is drawn with the line token and tonal surface tints before any shadow. Reserve shadow for genuine overlays.

dos: Do keep Signal Orange a signal: agenda ticks, hover emphasis, selection, small identity moments. Never fill a hero or button with it.
Do draw structure with the line hairline and surface tints before reaching for shadow.
Do use the serif (Literata) for reading, the grotesque (Hanken Grotesk) for headings and UI, and reserve mono (Spline Sans Mono) for technical tokens only.
Do cap reading measure at 68 to 72ch, and let the event agenda run full width for projection.
Do keep both light and dark themes co-equal and high-contrast; redefine every role token under .dark.
Do tint every neutral and use OKLCH for all color.
Do give every interactive element a visible 2px Signal Orange :focus-visible outline.
donts: Don't use crypto/altcoin hype visuals: no neon-on-black, no moon/rocket gimmickry, no speculative-trading energy.
Don't fall into the corporate SaaS template: no gradient hero, no big-number hero-metric blocks, no identical icon-card grids.
Don't overdesign: no decorative glassmorphism, no heavy or bouncy motion. Ease out only; respect prefers-reduced-motion.
Don't go sterile-minimal either: keep warmth and a local, human fingerprint.
Don't use a colored side-stripe (border-left/right > 1px) on cards, callouts, list items, or alerts. Use full hairline borders or a tonal background.
Don't use #000 or #fff, gradient text, or mono as decoration.
Don't card-ify content feeds; use rhythm-separated rows.
